item.title: PLEASE Give me a Signed Card 【 NEW HOLOLIVE CARD OPENING 】

item.content:encoded:
⭐ Please follow and support! ⭐ フォローとサポートはこちらへ！ ⭐ 팔로우와 후원은 여기로! Twitter - https://twitter.com/hwikkyofficial Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/hwikky ko-fi - https://www.ko-fi.com/hwikky StreamLabs - https://streamlabs.com/hwikky/tip
#hololive #ホロライブ #hololiveOCG
